org.midheaven.collections.AssociatedEnumerable

Package
Description
org.midheaven.collections
 

  • Uses of AssociatedEnumerable in org.midheaven.collections

    Methods in org.midheaven.collections that return AssociatedEnumerable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default <K> AssociatedEnumerable<K,T>
    Enumerable.associate(Function<T,K> keySelector)
    Returns associate.
    default <K, V> AssociatedEnumerable<K,V>
    Enumerable.associate(Function<T,K> keySelector, Function<T,V> valueSelector)
    Returns associate.
    default <K> AssociatedEnumerable<K,Enumerable<T>>
    Enumerable.groupBy(Function<T,K> groupSelector)
    Performs groupBy.
    default <Q, W> AssociatedEnumerable<Q,W>
    AssociatedEnumerable.mapEntries(Function<Association.Entry<K,V>,Association.Entry<Q,W>> mapper)
    Maps Association.Entry to new Association.Entry
    default <Q> AssociatedEnumerable<Q,V>
    AssociatedEnumerable.mapKey(Function<K,Q> mapper)
    Maps existing keys to new keys , keeping the same values
    default <W> AssociatedEnumerable<K,W>
    AssociatedEnumerable.mapValue(Function<V,W> mapper)
    Maps existing keys to new values , keeping the same keys
